description: Co-Dialectic hooks — persistent survival + dev-cycle visibility + foundation invariant harnesses + auto-handoff before compaction. SessionStart auto-installs survival layer. UserPromptSubmit re-injects codi context + OS-grounded datetime (temporal-grounding harness). PreToolUse(Skill) emits plugin+version+scope banner. PreToolUse(Edit/Write/MultiEdit) fires the codify-or-mark-uncodified scan on .md files in invariant-carrier locations. Stop hook fires the unit-of-work-commit reminder when workspace cwd has uncommitted changes. PreCompact hook (v4.21.0+) auto-triggers the codi-handoff skill before context summarization — catches the gap where Protocol 9 closure detection misses compaction events that fire without user closure phrases.

statusLine._note: Claude Code reads statusLine from user settings.json, not plugin hooks.json. This entry is documentation — the install.sh / SKILL.md installer wires statusline.sh into ~/.claude/settings.json at install time.
